reworkQueue.description: Pre-existing spec 041 QF-connector capability-handshake / integration-test fixture mismatch. Commit e53ee406 (Stream D snapshot) introduced internal/connector/qfdecisions/capability.go::CapabilitiesPath and made Connector.Connect() perform a capability handshake against that path BEFORE fetching decision events. The integration test fixtures tests/integration/qf_decisions_connector_config_test.go + tests/integration/qf_decisions_sync_test.go t.Fatalf on any path other than DecisionEventsPath. Result: ./smackerel.sh test integration exits 1 with TestQFDecisionsConnectorConfigRegistryAndHealthIntegration + TestQFDecisionsSyncThroughStateStoreAndArtifactPublisherWithStablePacketIDs both FAIL. Failures have no causal link to BUG-045-001's Scope 2 pre-emit gate or Scope 3 YAML rebalance. BLOCKS: BUG-045-001 §2.G, §2.L, §3.D, §3.N, §4.M (AC-10 full close).

Reconciliation belongs to spec 041 owner.

reworkQueue.resolutionEvidence: Upstream-pending 2026-05-17. Root cause confirmed: artifact-lint.sh calls info() but never defines it; bash falls through to GNU info reader. Local framework patch in place at .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh (adds info() function + extends path-signal regex for yml). Local patch is essential: without it, every in-flight bug folder's artifact-lint crashes. Framework proposal filed at .github/bubbles-project/proposals/20260516-artifact-lint-missing-info-function.md. Drift hash (expected 9386dd6f / actual d9c66e59) is transparently surfaced by cli.sh doctor and will clear automatically on next upstream Bubbles framework refresh containing the proposal's fix. Local bug-folder artifact-lint exits 0 thanks to the patch; the only doctor failure is the drift itself (which is the intentional cost of keeping the patch in place during the upstream-pending window).
reworkQueue.description: Pre-existing Bubbles framework artifact-lint.sh script bug: the script calls `info "..."` on lines 578 and 580 but never defines a local `info()` function (unlike every other Bubbles script which defines info() — confirmed via grep across .github/bubbles/scripts/**/*.sh: 7 other scripts define info(); artifact-lint.sh is the lone exception). When the elif branch is reached (state_status != state_status_ceiling AND state_status_ceiling == 'done' — which is the path taken for ANY bug folder with workflowMode=bugfix-fastlane AND status=in_progress, since bugfix-fastlane inherits statusCeiling=done from base-delivery), Bash falls through to PATH and invokes GNU `info` (the documentation reader), which fails with `info: No menu item '...' in node '(dir)Top'` and exits 1, causing the whole artifact-lint.sh script to exit 1. Git blame shows the bug was introduced in commit c363141c (framework refresh 3.5.2→3.6.1; 40 lines added to artifact-lint.sh). Other bug folders pass artifact-lint cleanly because their status=done hits the first elif branch (`state_status == state_status_ceiling`) which calls `pass` (defined) instead of `info`. BLOCKS: BUG-045-001 bug-folder artifact-lint exit 0 while bug is in_progress. Status 'upstream-pending' indicates the finding has a local patch in place AND a filed framework proposal; will clear automatically on next upstream Bubbles framework refresh.
reworkQueue.recommendedAction: Owner of Bubbles framework adds the standard `info()` function definition to .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh (matching the pattern in regression-baseline-guard.sh:26: `info() { printf "${CYAN}  ℹ️  %s${NC}\n" "$1"; }`). Bubbles framework repo update will propagate down via the framework-update sync path.
